_comment: keyed by day-or-group + hour-range. script picks most-specific match, then randomly from the list.

0-1: 🦉 night owl mode — writing code that won't make sense tomorrow
🎧 lofi hip-hop radio, 5 tabs, one thought
6-7: ☕ first coffee, don't talk to me yet
🪥 brushing teeth, thinking about tech debt
🌅 staring at the ceiling negotiating with my alarm
8-9: 💻 opening the laptop with malicious intent
10-11: 📖 reading docs that didn't need to be this long
🤔 staring at a PR wondering who wrote this (it was me)
12-13: 🍱 deciding between 4 places I eat at every week
14-15: 👨‍💻 coding with the kind of focus that scares people
16-17: 📝 writing a blog draft I'll never publish
☕ third coffee, committing war crimes in git
18-19: 🍜 hawker dinner — zi char or bust
🍲 eating something that earned its MSG
22-23: 🦇 the witching hour, terminal glow on the face

9-11: 📓 taking notes that will never be re-read
14-16: 🧪 data science lab — spreadsheet of shame
📊 tutorial, pretending I did the pre-reading

10-12: 🎓 in a math module trying not to cry
📐 proof that I regret choosing DSA

13-15: 🏫 on campus, hunting for an empty study room

21-23: 🍻 rare social event, will bail early

10-14: 🛋️ horizontal, watching a studio ghibli film for the Nth time
15-19: 🧹 tidying my desk — peak productivity energy
